//: Autobahn-testsuite fuzzingclient config for Hyperion's WS echo rackup.
Boots an echo server on ws://127.0.0.1:9888 (bench/ws_echo_autobahn.ru),
then drives the canonical RFC 6455 conformance fuzzer against it.
Run via Docker (no local Python dep):
After the run open ./autobahn-reports/index.html for the HTML report
Cases note: the full RFC 6455 case set is 463 cases (~17 minutes
wall clock with deflate negotiated). Cases 9.* (very-large-message
performance probes, 16+ MiB) are excluded because they require
raising max_message_bytes well beyond Hyperion's 1 MiB default and
are perf measurements rather than conformance checks. Uncomment by
removing the entry from `exclude-cases` for a soak run.
